untranslatable_reason: Advance/Decline line is not available in allowed indicators. The signal requires monitoring A/D line divergence from market averages and participation metrics (percentage of advancing vs declining stocks). These breadth indicators cannot be approximated from price/volume/momentum indicators alone. vol_ratio_20 used as weak proxy for participation narrowing, but true A/D line divergence detection is not possible.
translation_notes: Signal requires advance/decline line data which is not in the allowed indicator set. Attempted translation uses price_pos_20 (52-week relative position) as proxy for 'new highs' and vol_ratio_20 as weak proxy for 'participation narrowing', but this is fundamentally inadequate. The core signal—detecting when A/D line fails to confirm new highs—requires explicit breadth data. Position sizing set to 15% per parameters. Logic treats as SHORT bias with LONG maintenance per 'MAINTAIN_LONGS_ADD_SHORT_HEDGE' parameter.
